'''Belthu''' was a unaligned [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located near the territory of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. A wealthy planet being controlled by a coalition of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies led by corporate executives, it had a [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] [[Belthu durasteel foundry|foundry]] that was owned by an alias of Zsinj. The facility was eventually destroyed by [[Wraith Squadron]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Planet-stub}}
